description: Assess fish passage barriers in the Muncie project. Run the unsteady flow simulation (RasUnsteady) and analyze the HDF5 results to identify the 'Critical Cross-Section'—the river station with the highest maximum channel velocity. For this cross-section, calculate the 'Passable Duration' (total hours velocity remains strictly below 3.5 ft/s). Create a velocity time series plot named velocity_hydrograph.png for this location with a 3.5 ft/s threshold line. Save a JSON report to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/fish_passage_report.json with keys: critical_river_station, max_channel_velocity_fps, velocity_threshold_fps (3.5), and passable_duration_hours.
